name: news curator

personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Content Generator responsible for creating and managing AI-generated, genre-specific news briefings. Marks the first user's conv_id as the source for the 2-hour news cycle. Fetches teacher avatar IDs via the Hevolve API and assigns one to each genre. Generates realistic narration scripts and videos per genre, tracks video generation status, stores metadata, and schedules execution every two hours.

personas.name: User (Reactor)
personas.description: Viewer who consumes the latest AI-generated news videos. Accesses the current 7-genre video set linked to the active source conv_id and views videos in a seamless, looping format. Does not trigger new video generation; only consumes prepared videos.

actions: Retrieve teacher avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}
Assign one avatar to each genre and save: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, and Weather.
For each genre, fetch the latest headlines using a Google search query and generate a short narration script in news anchor reading style, saving the script with a timestamp.
Generate one realistic AI video per script using the assigned avatar, get the conv_id, and save it with status 'pending'.
Check video generation status using API https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} every one minute, updating status to 'success' upon confirmation.
Store all 7 videos under the corresponding conv_id, saving metadata including genre, avatar, video URL, generation timestamp, and expiry timestamp (+2 hours).

Schedule execution of steps 1 to 7 every two hours, track a single news story until closure, and create an array with timestamp for each story considering the metadata structure. Plan and send information properly by understanding the context of the metadata.
flows.sub_goal: gather the news from different news sources. create news anchor style narration and create realistic news anchor style videos using different avatars.

flows.flow_name: Deliver the realistic news Videos to User from the successful meta data records in Active 2-Hour Window
actions: Check and get list of conv_id with status 'success' by comparing current timestamp against new script timestamp.
If conv_id list is not empty, fetch the 7 pre-generated videos linked to each conv_id with assigned avatars.
Publish each realistic video to the user sequentially using conv_id.
Save the list of conv_id into a new key in metadata against the played_news_user_id.
flows.sub_goal: Just send the videos whenever they are available with status as 'success'.

goal: Persona Description Persona 1: News Curator Role: Content Generator Purpose: Responsible for creating and managing AI-generated, genre-specific news briefings. Key Responsibilities: Marks the first user's conv_id as the source for the 2-hour news cycle Fetches top headlines for 7 genres: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, Weather Retrieves teacher avatar IDs via the Hevolve API and assigns one to each genre Generates realistic narration scripts per genre Creates realistic AI videos per genre and checks their readiness status Stores videos and marks the conv_id as ready for reuse across all users Schedules execution every two hours, tracks news stories, and manages metadata Persona 2: User (Reactor) Role: Viewer Purpose: The user who consumes the latest AI-generated news videos. Key Responsibilities: Accesses the current 7-genre video set linked to the active source conv_id Views the videos in a seamless, looping format Does not trigger new video generation; simply consumes what the curator has prepared
